seoTitle: Cardup vs Carine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cardup and Carine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cardup and Carine.
heading: Cardup vs Carine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cardup, Western Australia and Carine, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cardup and Carine have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Cardup or Carine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cardup has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Carine scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cardup scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Carine scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cardup or Carine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cardup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
